arts.ttl: Tamworth slammed after ticket announcement for Tottenham FA Cup tie
arts.sum: National League club Tamworth have been slammed after more than doubling their ticket prices for the lucrative FA Cup third-round tie against Tottenham Hotspur next month. These prices are more than double in comparison to how much Tamworth charged fans for Huddersfield Town's trip to The Lamb Ground earlier in the season.

arts.ttl: English club submits €20 million offer for Tottenham and Newcastle target
arts.sum: Leeds United are keen on signing the Uzbekistan international defender Abdukodir Khusanov. According to Top Mercato, clubs like Newcastle, Manchester City and Tottenham Hotspur are keen on the 20-year-old central defender as well but it seems that Leeds have now stolen a march on the rivals and submitted an official proposal. arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: Ange Postecoglou maintains the backing of Tottenham's board but the League Cup semi-final against Liverpool is emerging as key to the Australian's prospects..

arts.ttl: New suspension worry emerges for Ange Postecoglou and Tottenham ahead of Newcastle United fixture
arts.sum: In regards to suspensions, Sunday's round of Premier League games are very important as they represent the halfway stage of the season and also the cut-off point for a one-match ban for five yellow cards. As ever, any player who picks up five yellow cards in their team's first 19 league games of the season will be handed a one-match ban.
